title: Amroha Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Amroha with a Z-Score of +5.83. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Amroha is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 19.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is moderate at 13.8 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue, with no sign of relief in the near future, posing a significant threat to the local population.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
